responses:
No problem! To update or recover your registered email address, please visit your nearest branch with your National ID or passport. Our staff will verify your identity and assist you with the email update.

Alternatively, you can:
• Call our 24/7 helpline at **1-800-BANK-HELP**
• Visit the **Profile Settings** section in our mobile app (if you can still log in)
• Email us at **support@bank.com** with your account number and ID proof

For security reasons, email changes require identity verification. We're here to help!

Don't worry, it happens! Here's how you can update your email address:

1. **Via Mobile App** – Go to Settings > Profile > Edit Email (you'll need to verify via OTP to your phone)
2. **Visit a Branch** – Bring a valid ID and your account details
3. **Call Support** – Reach us at **1-800-BANK-HELP** any time

Would you like help with anything else?
intents.description: User forgot their email or wants to change their registered email address
examples: I need to change my email
How do I update my email address?

responses: I understand you're frustrated, and I'm truly sorry for the inconvenience. I'm here to help you resolve this as quickly as possible. Could you please describe the issue you're facing so I can assist you better?
I'm sorry to hear you're having a difficult experience. I genuinely want to help — please let me know what's going wrong and I'll do my best to sort it out for you.
I can see this is causing you frustration, and I apologize for that. Let's work through this together. What exactly is the problem you're experiencing?
Your feelings are valid, and I'm sorry things aren't going smoothly. I'm here to help — please share the details of your issue and I'll get it resolved for you right away.
intents.description: User expresses anger or uses profanity — respond with empathy and de-escalation
